title: MATCH_RECOGNIZE is now in Beta
body: Databricks SQL and Databricks Runtime now support the SQL:2016 `MATCH_RECOGNIZE` clause for row pattern recognition. Enable the **Match Recognize** preview in [workspace preview settings](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews). See [MATCH\_RECOGNIZE clause](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-qry-select-match-recognize).
